mapper.sql: id, user_id, dept_id, is_default, enabled, create_by, create_at, update_by, update_at, object_version_number

sd.dept_id, sd.parent_id, sd.ancestors, sd.dept_code, sd.dept_name, sd.order_num, sd.leader, sd.phone, sd.email, sd.status, sd.del_flag, sd.accounte_unit, sd.org_id, sd.create_by, sd.create_time, sd.update_by, sd.update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT su.user_id, su.user_name, su.nick_name, su.email, su.phonenumber, su.status, su.create_time FROM sys_user su JOIN sys_user_org suo ON su.user_id = suo.user_id AND suo.org_id = #{orgId} AND suo.enabled = 1 WHERE su.user_id NOT IN ( SELECT sud.user_id FROM sys_user_dept sud WHERE sud.dept_id = #{deptId} )
AND su.user_name like concat('%', #{param.userName}, '%')
AND su.phonenumber like concat('%', #{param.phonenumber}, '%')

select d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_code, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.status, d.org_id, sud.is_default as is_user_default_dept, su.nick_name as update_by, sud.update_at as update_time, sud.id as user_dept_id from sys_dept d join sys_user_dept sud on d.dept_id = sud.dept_id and sud.user_id = #{userId} and sud.enabled = 1 left join sys_user su on su.user_id = sud.update_by where d.del_flag = '0' and d.org_id = #{orgId} order by sud.is_default desc, d.parent_id, d.order_num

select , sud.id as user_dept_id from sys_dept sd join sys_user_dept sud on sud.dept_id = sd.dept_id and sud.user_id = #{userId} where sd.org_id = #{orgId}
and sud.is_default = 1

select
from sys_user_dept where user_id = #{userId} and is_default = 1

select
from sys_user_dept where dept_id in (select dept_id from sys_dept where dept_id = #{deptId} or parent_id = #{deptId})

select
from sys_user_dept where user_id = (select user_id from sys_user where user_name = #{userName})

select
from sys_user_dept where user_id in
#{item}
and is_default = 1

select
from sys_user_dept where user_id in (select user_id from sys_user where user_name in
#{item}
and del_flag = 0 and status = 0 ) and is_default = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_dept ( user_id, dept_id, is_default, enabled, create_by, create_at, update_by, update_at, object_version_number ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{isDefault}, #{enabled}, #{operatorUserId}, #{operateAt}, #{operatorUserId}, #{operateAt}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user_dept SET is_default = #{isDefault}, enabled = #{enabled}, update_by = #{operatorUserId}, update_at = #{operateAt}, object_version_number = object_version_number + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
